phase_name: session 89 — bug fixes BUG-01 through BUG-05

completed_tasks.name: BUG-01 — Spanish limitation string in --agent output
completed_tasks.detail: architecture_analyzer.py: translated 'Arquitectura no inferida: proyecto sin archivos de codigo suficientes' to English.

completed_tasks.name: BUG-02 + BUG-03 — Risk scoring inconsistency impact vs impact-chain
completed_tasks.detail: Unified threshold table in risk_scoring.py. impact and impact-chain now use same scale.

completed_tasks.name: BUG-04 — OFBiz Gradle phantom deps + missing real deps
completed_tasks.detail: dependency_analyzer.py: added _strip_gradle_comments() to prevent regex matching inside /* */ and // comments. Added apply from: traversal so dependencies.gradle is parsed. OFBiz now returns 87 real deps, 0 phantoms.

completed_tasks.name: BUG-05 — spring_detected: True on Keycloak (Quarkus/JAX-RS)
completed_tasks.detail: spring_model.py: added _JPA_ONLY_STEREOTYPES and BeanGraph.has_spring_beans() — JPA @Entity classes excluded from Spring detection. spring_tx_analyzer.py and spring_security_audit.py updated to use has_spring_beans(). Removed security_model != 'unknown' false proxy from security auditor.

remaining_tasks.name: BUG-06 — project_type: unknown on openmrs-core
remaining_tasks.detail: openmrs-core has pom.xml + Spring MVC + 30 @Transactional boundaries but reports project_type: unknown. Investigate repo_classifier.py or compact output assembly.

remaining_tasks.name: BUG-07 — Eureka misidentified as Jakarta EE
remaining_tasks.detail: Eureka (Netflix) uses Guice/Jersey but is classified as Jakarta EE. Same classifier as BUG-06.

remaining_tasks.name: P3 (session 85) — Windows cache slow
remaining_tasks.detail: cache.py:810 _atomic_write — PermissionError on Path.replace() silently swallowed. Requires Windows to validate.

blockers.description: P3 Windows cache: not reproducible on macOS
blockers.workaround: Static analysis of cache.py:810 possible but no validation

decisions.decision: ris.py _spring_detected (REST layer detection) intentionally not changed for BUG-05
decisions.rationale: Used for incomplete_snapshot validation, not just repo_type. Keycloak structural_map showed 0 controllers anyway — not the active path for this bug.
Not causing observable bugs in Keycloak; separate concern from BUG-05.

next_action: BUG-06: project_type: unknown on openmrs-core. Run sourcecode --compact on repo, locate project_type classification code, fix to detect Spring when @Transactional + Spring MVC annotations present.
context_notes: Session 89 fixed 5 bugs (BUG-01 through BUG-05). 2499 tests pass. Tree clean at cf3d699. Testing repos at /Users/user/Documents/workspace/testing/.
